title: lacmellea standleyi
intro: Lacmellea standleyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as a milkwood tree. It is native to Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Lacmellea standleyi is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
